body.title: Igor web responses garbled 2026-06-06 ~12:38-13:56: investigate via logs
body.result: root cause: thread context injector pulls old channel history; NarrativeEngine responds to injected context not actual message; fix ticket T-web-thread-context-scope filed
body.description:
**Problem:** Web conversation 2026-06-06 shows Igor giving garbled responses — at 12:41:44 Igor responded with 'I read the blog post [about polyamory]' in response to Akien explaining about The Librarian agent. At 13:56:40 response was just 'Good to hear from you. What's next?' after a long silence. Suggests message routing confusion or context bleed between conversation threads.

**Timestamps to investigate:** 12:38:11 (akien hello), 12:38:24 (igor), 12:41:09 (akien librarian), 12:41:44 (igor polyamory non-sequitur), 12:42:43 (akien scifi novel), 12:55:02 (akien no replies seen), 12:56:35 (akien web page plan), 13:34:40 (any thoughts), 13:56:34 (akien hello), 13:56:40 (igor 'what's next')

**Method:** Use logging skill to pull Igor logs at these timestamps. Look for: message routing decisions, what context Igor was using when generating each response, any context bleed from other conversation threads.

**Affected files:** Igor logs at ~/.unseen_university/Igor-wild-0001/ around 2026-06-06 12:38-13:57
**Design rules:** Diagnose before fixing
**Scope boundary:** Log investigation and root cause identification only. Deprioritize — do after Granny and DickSimnel work.
**Completion criteria:** Root cause of garbled responses identified. Noted in ticket. Fix ticket filed if needed.

ROOT CAUSE (2026-06-07): web_server.log confirms thread context injector at 12:41:44 sent Igor: 'akien: [Thread context — recent exchanges in this channel:] User: I was once at...' — old channel history (blog-reading content) prepended to Akien's Librarian message. Igor's NarrativeEngine arc at 12:41:26 shows it engaged on the injected context, not the real message. Fix needed: thread context injector must filter to current-session exchanges only, not all recent channel history. 13:56 minimal response appears to be NE brief-response after 22-min silence — separate issue, lower severity.
